goal: Co má video docílit (1-2 věty lidsky)
product_visual_identity: STRICT PRODUCT IDENTITY clause — describe the EXACT visual anatomy of the product (colors, proportions, branding placement, materials, key visual features). This text gets injected into the storyboard prompt to lock product fidelity. Include an ABSOLUTE NEGATIVE LIST of what the product is NOT (don't render as X, Y, Z).

shared_choices.color_palette_label: Short label (~5-10 words) describing the palette mood
shared_choices.environment_fingerprint: 1 sentence describing the location across all cuts
shared_choices.scene_continuity: OPTIONAL — only when all cuts share the same location. Describe what stays constant across cuts (props in fixed positions, room layout, lighting direction, etc.) so the model doesn't shift the scene between shots.

character.description: Detailed character description for consistency across cuts (age, ethnicity, hair, build, vibe). Pulled DYNAMICALLY into the Seedance prompt — no hardcoded fallback.

cuts.subject_framing: Where subject is in frame, what action they perform, product placement and orientation
cuts.video_prompt: Full Seedance prompt — describes camera, action, mood, product anatomy. NO dialog.

voiceover.style_instructions: Speak in Czech with a warm intimate tone. Continuous flowing delivery, NO pauses. PRONUNCIATION RULES: 'BrandName' is pronounced as 'PHONETIC-RESPELL' — write phonetic respell directly in the script field, not here. GRADUATION ARC: soft start → quiet conviction → calm landing. Female voice mid-30s/40s, warm, mature. NOT a commercial announcer voice.
voiceover.script: Plný český text bez pauz. Brand name napiš foneticky (např. 'Akvýna' místo 'Aqueena').
